ew_context: Price attempting to break above consolidation resistance after completing corrective pullback from recent highs
pattern_desc: Breakout above key resistance level at 97.24 with 3 prior touches, supported by elevated RSI momentum despite bearish EMA structure
key_levels: Key resistance: 97.24 (breakout level). Next resistance: 98.28 (swing high). Support: 96.64 (recent swing low)
invalidation: Failure to hold above 97.00 or close below entry invalidates the breakout pattern
market_context: Oil prices consolidating amid US-Iran tensions but easing on diplomatic hopes. Geopolitical premium supporting upside momentum despite broader risk-off sentiment
